title: Organization
description: An organizational unit in the HKBU Scholars Pure Web Service API. Derived from the real Pure API 5.35.0 OpenAPI contract.

pureId.description: Pure database ID of the object.

uuid.description: UUID, the primary identity of the entity.

modifiedBy.description: Username of the user that performed a modification.

modifiedDate.description: Date and time of last modification.

portalUrl.description: URL of the content on the Pure Portal.

version.description: Used to guard against conflicting updates.

type.description: Classification reference for the organization type.
